pr.title: Non-record: val_bpb=1.1374, FA2+SWA adaptation of Farnsworth

output.summary: Adapted FarnsworthEngine using FA2/INT6, SmearGate+BigramHash, muon+SWA/WD tuning, and TTT sliding-window eval to meet 16MB artifacts.
techniques: SmearGate+BigramHash 11L MLP3x INT6 model with FA2 attention
Muon optimizer with tuned WD and SWA warmdown for artifact-size control
TTT sliding-window evaluation on validation data for post-quant adaptation
